$comment: c155 D-LK10-CRT-INIT-INVOKE closure witness #2: the fopen+fwrite+fclose / fopen+fread+fclose+remove stream roundtrip — the anchor's cited stdio-stream case — works on EVERY runnable leg with the trampoline calling main directly (no user-side CRT-init sequence): each format's loader runs libc's own init first (pe: msvcrt DllMain; elf: ld.so runs libc.so.6's initializers; macho: dyld runs libSystem's before LC_MAIN).
